query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS healthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS healthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS healthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS unhealthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready <= 0

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS unhealthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready <= 0

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS unhealthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready <= 0
